CustomField.description: The API name of the field on the source object (typically Opportunity or Payment) whose values are aggregated by this user-defined rollup. For example, "Amount" on Opportunity for a sum-of-donations rollup, or "npe01__Payment_Amount__c" on Payment for a payment-based rollup. The field's data type must be compatible with the selected Field Action (e.g., numeric fields for SUM/AVG, any field for MIN/MAX/COUNT).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The field on the source object (e.g. Opportunity.Amount) whose values are aggregated by this rollup.
CustomField.label: Source Field
